divergences.claim: isValidName(name) returns true only for a NON-EMPTY name of at most 50 characters: it checks name.length > 0 && name.length <= 50. An empty string is rejected.
divergences.prose: isValidName(name) returns true only for a NON-EMPTY name of at most 50 characters: it checks name.length > 0 && name.length <= 50. An empty string is rejected.
